---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash or unexpected behavior
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what happened.

**To reproduce**
Steps to trigger the issue.

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened instead.

**Screenshots**
If applicable.

**Environment**
- Windows version: [e.g. Windows 11 23H2]
- OpenSnap version: [e.g. v0.9.5]
- .NET version: [e.g. .NET 8.0.10]

**Logs**
Check `%LOCALAPPDATA%\OpenSnap\logs\` for any `.log` files and attach them.
